 # NovaMind AI - Strategic Memory

-## CRITICAL CHANGES THIS WEEK
-- **Upgraded Plan A/B from T2 to T4** → quality jumps from 0.2771 to 0.3694 for S1-A
-- **S1 group promo set to $2** → S1-A effective price = $8 - $2 = $6/mo for new leads
-- **S1 lead promo set to $4** → first billing even cheaper
-- **Per-customer promos**: customers 841, 919, 935 each get $6 to maintain $6/mo effective price
-- **Ops increased to $20/day** (from $5) to help clear issue backlog
-- **No ads this week** — testing if T4 quality converts organic S1 leads
+## CRITICAL DISCOVERY (Week 31)
+- **S1 leads evaluate at LIST PRICE, not effective price (list - promo)**
+- At A=$8 list: S1 expected q=0.3652, delivered=0.3644 → gap only -0.0008 (BARELY fails!)
+- At A=$6 list: S1 expected q=0.2941, delivered=0.3644 → gap +0.070 (SAFELY converts!)
+- **set_prices does NOT change existing subscriber listed prices!** They're frozen at signup time
+- This means lowering Plan A only affects new subscriber revenue, not existing

+- Until ~week 22, A=$14 listed, S1 promo=$2, A was at T2 (0.75x quality=0.2771)

+- At A=$8 (lowered week 27), S1 expected 0.3652 vs 0.3644 → rejected by 0.0008
+- The quality-price gap was TINY - just needed a small price cut or quality boost
+

+## UNIT ECONOMICS (critical knowledge)
+- S1 usage: ~15 units/day per sub (estimated from actual compute costs)
+- S2 usage: ~200 units/day per sub (guess)
+- S3 usage: ~570 units/day per sub (from market insights)
+- Total average: ~45 units/day per sub across all groups
+- T4 compute: $0.012/unit, T5: $0.03/unit
+- S1-A compute cost: 15 * $0.012 = $0.18/day = $5.40/mo
+- S1-A at $6 list - $2 promo = $4/mo → barely profitable (margin $0.02/sub/day)
+- S3-A at $14/mo: revenue $0.47/day, compute $6.84/day → HUGE LIABILITY
+- S2-B at $35-49/mo: revenue $1.17-1.63/day, compute possibly ~$2.40/day → loss
 
-## Financial Projections

-

 ## LESSONS LEARNED (CRITICAL)
 1. Lead promo DOES NOT affect evaluation price - only first billing
-2. Ongoing promo (set_promotion) DOES affect evaluation price
-3. Competitor events permanently raise quality expectations
-4. S1 stopped converting at T2 quality (0.2771) even at $8/mo
-5. Tenure loyalty keeps existing subs (up to +0.13 quality bonus)
-6. T4 gives 33% quality boost over T2 — critical for conversion
-7. S1-A has low usage (~6 units/sub/day) at T2 → higher at T4
-8. When removing group promo, must replace with per-plan or per-customer promos
-9. The $500/day dev burn was unsustainable — T4 upgrade is better per dollar
-10. PMI contraction makes growth harder
-11. At T2, ALL 8 S1 leads this week were LOST (0% conversion)
-12. 369 open issues = reputation damage, negative social posts, fewer leads
-13. Capacity T0 at $85/day is minimum — can't reduce further
-14. S2 requires q_min=0.521 — unreachable without R&D or massive dev spend
-15. Enterprise groups unreachable (q_min > 0.66)
+2. Ongoing promo (set_promotion) affects billing/satisfaction, NOT lead evaluation
+3. NEW LEADS EVALUATE AT LIST PRICE ONLY (set_prices)
+4. Listed prices are FROZEN at subscription time - set_prices doesn't change existing
+5. S1 stopped converting because quality gap was only -0.0008 at $8
+6. Competitor events permanently raise quality expectations
+7. Tenure loyalty keeps existing subs (up to +0.13 quality bonus)
+8. Low-usage groups (S1) are profitable; high-usage (S3) are money losers
+9. S3-A single sub loses ~$6.37/day in compute = $191/mo
+10. Don't target high-usage groups with ads or low-price plans
+11. R&D is the only path to reaching S2/E1-E3 but costs $500K+
 
-## NEXT ACTIONS (Week 31)
-- **WATCH**: Did T4 quality convert any S1 organic leads?
-- **IF YES**: Add $10-20/day ads for S1 on social_media → accelerate growth
-- **IF NO**: Lower S1-A effective price further or check for quality penalties
-- Consider S3 targeting (WTP=$193, q_min=0.145) — big revenue opportunity
-- Consider D_S07/D_S10 targeting (similar to S1 but higher WTP)
-- Increase ops spending further if issues not resolving fast enough
-- Monitor churn of existing 31 S1-A subs at $12/mo effective
\ No newline at end of file
